title: allium diehlii
intro: Allium diehlii is a species of wild garlic native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allium diehlii include reducing the risk of certain diseases, such as heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Allium diehlii typically involve drying and crushing the leaves and flowers to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
